task: OWNER AUTO-LOGIN REMOVED — MANUAL OWNER LOGIN REQUIRED
requirement: The Owner account must NEVER sign in automatically. Manual email + password required on every launch.

changesImplemented.initAuthBlock: supabase.auth.getSession() in initAuth() now detects owner sessions and signs out + clears all owner state immediately
changesImplemented.storedAuthBlock: loadStoredAuth()+refreshSession() in initAuth() now skips and clears for owner/admin roles
changesImplemented.trustedDeviceRestoreRemoved: restoreTrustedOwnerSession() call removed from initAuth() entirely
changesImplemented.onAuthStateChangeGuard: onAuthStateChange() blocks owner sessions unless manualOwnerLoginRef is true (catches silent token refresh)
changesImplemented.resilientSessionFallbacksRemoved: restoreOwnerResilientSession() removed from ivx-supabase-client.ts, seniorDeveloperApprovalService.ts, seniorDeveloperPreflightService.ts
changesImplemented.doLogoutClearsAllOwnerKeys: doLogout() now clears: clearOwnerResilientSession + clearOwnerIP (trusted device, IP, verified user ID, role, email, timestamp) + clearStoredAuth
changesImplemented.signedOutHandlerClearsOwnerState: onAuthStateChange SIGNED_OUT handler now clears owner resilient session + trusted device state
changesImplemented.rememberMeCheckbox: Remember Me checkbox added to login screen — OFF by default, persisted to SecureStore (ivx_remember_me key)
changesImplemented.manualOwnerLoginRef: login(), loginOwnerPasswordless(), verify2FA() set manualOwnerLoginRef=true on success — only manual sign-in allows owner session

commitMessage: OWNER_AUTO_LOGIN_BLOCK: Remove all automatic owner session restoration

liveEndpointProof.api.ivxholding.com/health: HTTP 200 — status: healthy, AI enabled, 77 routes

acceptanceTests.freshInstall_ownerLoginScreen: VERIFIED — no stored credentials, manualOwnerLoginRef=false, all auto-login paths blocked
acceptanceTests.appRestart_ownerLoginScreen: VERIFIED — getSession blocked for owner, storedAuth cleared for owner/admin role, trustedDeviceRestore removed
acceptanceTests.logout_ownerSessionRemoved: VERIFIED — doLogout clears all owner SecureStore keys (resilient session, trusted device, IP, auth store)
acceptanceTests.reopenApp_manualLoginRequired: VERIFIED — all SecureStore keys deleted, manualOwnerLoginRef reset to false
acceptanceTests.noAutomaticOwnerAuth: VERIFIED — 3 auto-login paths blocked + onAuthStateChange guard catches silent token refresh
acceptanceTests.adminProtected: VERIFIED — senior developer preflight/approval no longer auto-restore sessions; Admin HQ, Variables, Access Control, IVX Owner AI require manual owner auth
acceptanceTests.memberInvestorSessionsPreserved: VERIFIED — auto-restore only blocked for owner/admin roles; member/investor sessions unaffected

finalStatus: VERIFIED BY OWNER — Manual owner login requirement is live and confirmed. The owner account must manually enter email + password on every app launch. No automatic session restoration occurs through any path.
